kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: TC-API-01 Validate Account Exists via API

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts path_url=/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Mon, 22 Jun 2026 18:15:22 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': 'a0fd3ceb6fdca830-DEL'} body=[{"id":12345,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":-3050.00},{"id":12456,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":260.45},{"id":12567,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":12678,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":-100.00},{"id":12789,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":12900,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":0.00},{"id":13011,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":13122,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":1100.00},{"id":13233,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":13344,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":1231.10},{"id":13677,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":13788,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":14121,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":14232,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":14343,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":54321,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":1351.12}]

C:\Users\mridu\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'parabank.parasoft.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
